## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] feat (new feature)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] docs (documentation)
- [ ] refactor (code change without behavior change)
- [ ] chore (build/tooling/maintenance)

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm -C orbinexsim-npm run build`
- [ ] `npm -C orbinexsim-npm run lint` (if package TypeScript changed)

## Checklist

- [ ] I linked related issue(s)
- [ ] I updated docs/README where needed
- [ ] I kept changes focused and reviewable

## Screenshots (if UI changed)

Add screenshots or a short recording.
